name: ClinicalTrials.gov MCP
description: Three pay-per-call x402 endpoints over the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 public registry: trials/search ($0.05), trials/by_nct ($0.05), sponsors/pipeline ($0.07). No signup, no API key — pay USDC on Base.

authentication.credentials: Pay-per-call via x402 USDC on Base — no signup, no API key. Each call returns 402 with an EXACT-scheme requirement; agents pay 0x1664530DC2A1CA350B1dbaD1Fc1F1a70c90fe4de in Base USDC and retry with X-PAYMENT.

skills.name: Clinical Trial Search (ClinicalTrials.gov v2)
skills.description: Search the live ClinicalTrials.gov v2 registry of every U.S./international clinical study by free-text query, phase (PHASE1..PHASE4/EARLY_PHASE1/NA), and overall status (RECRUITING, ACTIVE_NOT_RECRUITING, COMPLETED, TERMINATED). Returns flat agent-friendly rows with NCT id, title, status, phase, study type, conditions, lead sponsor, start date, and a direct ClinicalTrials.gov UI link. $0.05/call.
examples: Find recruiting Phase 3 trials for glioblastoma
List active oncology studies sponsored by Pfizer in the last year
Search ClinicalTrials.gov for completed Alzheimer's Phase 2 trials with results posted

skills.name: Clinical Trial Lookup by NCT id
skills.description: Fetch the full ClinicalTrials.gov record for a single study by NCT id. Returns the flattened protocol section: identification, status, sponsors + collaborators, design (allocation/masking/primary purpose), full eligibility criteria with min/max age and gender, interventions, primary + secondary outcomes with time frames, recruitment locations, FDA-regulation flags, results-availability flag, and brief + detailed descriptions. $0.05/call.
examples: Get the full protocol record for NCT04368728
What are the eligibility criteria and primary outcomes of NCT05158465?
Show me the recruitment locations and lead sponsor for NCT04611893

skills.name: Sponsor Pipeline Aggregation (ClinicalTrials.gov)
skills.description: Aggregate the public clinical-trial pipeline of a lead sponsor (pharma company, biotech, university, NIH institute). Returns by-phase and by-overall-status histograms plus the underlying flat trial rows for downstream filtering. Useful for competitive landscape analysis, biotech due-diligence, sponsor portfolio mapping, and tracking adversary/partner pipelines. $0.07/call.
examples: Show Pfizer's clinical pipeline aggregated by phase
What's the phase distribution of all Moderna trials?
Aggregate the National Cancer Institute's clinical-trial pipeline by overall status
